BlockedOutcome.description: Structured expectations for a deliberately blocked action attempt.
BlockedOutcome.title: BlockedOutcome

CaseContext.description: The initiating LLM request context for a case.
CaseContext.title: CaseContext

EvalCase.description: A single predefined user request evaluated against a frozen fixture.
EvalCase.title: EvalCase

Expected.description:
Outcome-evidence expectations: salient facts, exclusions, and side effects.

``answer_values`` and ``expected_values`` are diagnostic report hints only.
Scoring is grounded in structured tool outputs, recorded actions, recorder
checks, and blocked-action side effects instead of parsing model prose.
Expected.title: Expected

ExpectedAction.description: A service action the model is expected to (or not to) propose.
ExpectedAction.title: ExpectedAction

ModelSettings.description:
Settings to configure an LLM.

Includes only settings which apply to multiple models / model providers,
though not all of these settings are supported by all models.

All types must be serializable using Pydantic.
ModelSettings.title: ModelSettings

OutputConfig.description: Configuration for the score and assertion outputs of the LLMJudge evaluator.
OutputConfig.title: OutputConfig

SpanQuery.description:
A serializable query for filtering SpanNodes based on various conditions.

All fields are optional and combined with AND logic by default.
SpanQuery.title: SpanQuery

ToolOrOutput.description:
Restricts function tools while keeping output tools and direct text/image output available.

Use this when you want to control which function tools the model can use
in an agent run while still allowing the agent to complete with structured output,
text, or images.

See the [Tool Choice guide](../tools-advanced.md#tool-choice) for examples.
ToolOrOutput.title: ToolOrOutput

ToolResultCheck.description: Structured evidence expected in a successful recorder tool result.
ToolResultCheck.title: ToolResultCheck
